read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":6203},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1720615417,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7390310234580435774","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看，家人们！特别喜欢女主烟烟，不管是性格、形象、处理事情的方式、训练菜鸟的方式等，我只能用一个字来形容，绝！不管前期多么累、多么痛苦，都只是为了能在险境活下来，平安回来。我们烟烟用一颗真心对待里面的角色，怎么说吧，她不是只是一味的去保护他们，而是让他们在成长的路上变得更坚韧更强大。世界一:烟烟CP哈雷世界二:烟烟CP王艳兵……作者大大写得很好(=゜ω゜)ノ，期待(✧◡✧)快点更新啦[爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1720691697,"group_id":"7366424007186336793","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"读书破万卷，下笔如没魂(´-ι_-｀)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny0hFyWP9Vp/C6eF5KTVzqEWkeu6lZly/Ce4xqoa0w9Q","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/17b52a52c5354eb4bc13821787037bb3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776883281&x-signature=5RcIiqO%2F5bBN3zqY%2Bec%2Fa5avR10%3D","user_id":"1495750956817059","user_name":"不要叫我师姐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1495750956817059","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1798673276,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":1
